base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ui_hud_menus — a ui (hud_readout) from 1994 super metroid. Energy tank HUD + auto-map + item-select + beam-select + Mother Brain defeat cutscene + escape-countdown timer. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Energy tank HUD + auto-map + item-select + beam-select + Mother Brain defeat cutscene + escape-countdown timer
